title: TCP/IP Protocol Stack and Data Encapsulation
description: A visual representation showing how data is packaged and processed through the layers of the TCP/IP model, from application creation to physical transmission.
relationships: Application data is passed to Transport layer and encapsulated with a TCP/UDP header
TCP segment is passed to Internet layer and encapsulated with an IP header to form a packet
IP packet is passed to Network Access layer and encapsulated with frame header/trailer
Frame is converted to bits and transmitted physically across the network
